_meta.description: AI Security Platform — Splunk dashboard. Import into Splunk Enterprise / Cloud as a Classic dashboard XML or via Dashboard Studio (paste into Source).

panels.title: Block rate (24h)
panels.search: index=main sourcetype=ai_security event_type IN ("block", "kill_switch") | stats count AS blocked | appendcols [search index=main sourcetype=ai_security | stats count AS total] | eval pct = round((blocked / total) * 100, 2)

panels.title: Top categories of findings
panels.search: index=main sourcetype=ai_security event_type=finding | stats count BY category | sort -count

panels.title: Block reasons
panels.search: index=main sourcetype=ai_security action_taken=blocked | stats count BY block_reason | sort -count | head 10

panels.title: Latency p95 over time
panels.search: index=main sourcetype=ai_security | timechart span=15m p95(latency_ms) AS p95_latency_ms

saved_searches.name: AI Security — critical findings in last hour
AI Security — anomalous tool usage
saved_searches.search: index=main sourcetype=ai_security event_type=runtime_event "runtime.policy_violation" | stats count BY asset_id, tool_name | where count > 50
